comments.message:
All of the things featured in the anime are real, including random vegetables sprouting up from the ground once it has been plowed and fertilized.
Pretty sure the 'forest of death' is conscious, and chose what plants to have pop up for our boy. Or a dryad/spirits did it.

The tomatoes not being perfect tomatoes is half proof that they're not from the tool, and half proof that the soil he makes is waaayyy too fertile. That actually happens irl. Good vegetables have gone through a little bit of stress.

If you copy the designs of the buildings/defenses that he made, apart from that uncovered opening, you'd do really really well in the wilderness. Whatever idol farming show he watched may have been an adaptation of a bunch of extremely detailed instructional audiobooks on how to build stuff
